description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular footprint with a dark, gabled roof extending over a single story. The front facade includes a covered porch area supported by columns, and the entryway is flanked by landscaped elements and signage. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and wooden structural accents. Large windows are present on the front and side elevations, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with fewer windows and a more private appearance. The structure sits on a flat, grassy plot, typical of suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a dark gabled roof, covered porch, and large windows, set on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, entryway, and landscaped signage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wall and a row of vertical window elements.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a more private, enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying additional windows and the side entrance area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
